strengths: Strong background in backend engineering, including high-throughput microservices and event-driven architectures.
Relevant domain exposure through senior software development roles in fintech and capital investment platforms.
Recent hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) developer tooling.
concerns: Lacks executive leadership experience, showing no history of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people or managing organizational budgets.
Insufficient production experience architecting stateful, multi-agent AI systems for high-stakes commercial or financial environments.
No demonstrated experience in building regulatory compliance infrastructure or governing external engineering partners.
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable Staff Software Engineer with strong expertise in distributed systems and polyglot programming, but he fundamentally lacks the executive leadership profile required for this CTO role. While he has recent exposure to AI-agent tooling and past experience in fintech, his resume does not demonstrate the required history of scaling engineering organizations, communicating with boards, or architecting enterprise-grade, multi-agent AI systems for real-time financial decision-making.
